title: geraniospermum grenvillei
intro: Geraniospermum grenvillei, a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, belongs to the family Menispermaceae and is also known as the Chinese moonseed. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geraniospermum grenvillei include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and extracts, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although its use is often subject to caution and further research due to potential toxicity.
